lane_policy.Lane A: UI not wired, no-op, missing handler, or visible false affordance that is a repo/UI implementation issue.
lane_policy.Lane B: API, permission, audit, persistence, fail-closed, native bridge, or runtime proof gap inside the product/runtime boundary.
lane_policy.Lane C: Descriptor-only or unavailable surface that has no runtime/provider/API layer yet.
lane_policy.Lane D: External provider, OS/native delivery, owner approval, public release, notarization, payment, data-cloud, or external receipt gate.
lane_policy.Lane E: Visual, accessibility, focus, mobile overflow, Korean copy, launch-boundary wording, or AI-slop/copy issue.

assignments.label: materRuntime.context
assignments.handler: runtime.js contextBridge.exposeInMainWorld("materRuntime", runtimeApi), but active desktopPreloadPath() returns ../preload/session.cjs, not runtime.js

assignments.label: Choose file for upload
assignments.handler: fileBridgeApi.chooseFileForUpload(event, request) -> fileBridge:choose-file-for-upload -> createFileBridgeController.chooseFileForUpload; active shell does not load fileBridge.js preload or call registerFileBridgeIpcHandlers

assignments.label: Save document as
assignments.handler: fileBridgeApi.saveDocumentAs(event, request) -> fileBridge:save-document-as -> createFileBridgeController.saveDocumentAs; active shell does not load fileBridge.js preload or call registerFileBridgeIpcHandlers

assignments.label: Open temp preview
assignments.handler: createTempPreviewManager.openTempPreview -> assertNoRendererDocumentBytes -> permissionClient.precheckFileBridgeAction(file_bridge.preview) -> documentProvider.fetchDocumentForPreview -> storage.createScopedTempFile; no active shell IPC/preload registration found in main.js

assignments.label: Route-only matter/document/task deep links
assignments.handler: parseMatterDeepLink -> validate matter/document/task route-only URL -> openMatterDeepLink -> permissionClient.precheckDeepLinkOpen -> audit opened/denied event

assignments.label: Auth callback deep link
assignments.handler: parseMatterDeepLink(matter://auth/callback?code&state&issuer) validates required query and returns auth_callback routeOnly intent; openMatterDeepLink records auth_callback opened audit without permission precheck; auth completion state validation remains MainProcessAuthCoordinator.completeCallback

assignments.label: Notification click route intent
assignments.handler: notificationClickToRouteIntent(payload) requires routeUrl -> parseMatterDeepLink(routeUrl) -> returns { source: "notification", routeOnly: true, intent }

assignments.label: Signed internal update apply
assignments.handler: createUpdateController().applyUpdate -> deny public channel -> verify HMAC signature -> set previousVersion/activeVersion; desktopSkeletonStatus.updateChannelExposed is false and no active app update IPC/channel is exposed in main.js

assignments.label: Signed internal rollback
assignments.handler: createUpdateController().rollback -> require previousVersion, matching verified target version, and valid signature before rolled_back state
